channel.title: Adarsh Nanjaiya Latha
channel.description: News and updates from Adarsh Nanjaiya Latha — Doctoral Candidate in Computer Science, University of Twente.

item.title: New post: Adaptive Spatiotemporal Graph Learning for Drone Swarms
item.description: A short review of recent work on learning over time-evolving graphs for swarm situational awareness — and its two open gaps.

item.title: Won the hackathon at the “Systems Meet AI” Summer School, TU Delft
item.description: Won the hackathon at the ACM Europe & 4TU.NIRICT Summer School “Systems Meet AI” at TU Delft.

item.title: Supervised two BSc theses on drone-based perception
item.description: Two BSc students I supervised completed their theses on drone-based perception (S. S. Birla and D. Buinevičius).

item.title: Open-source contribution to py123d
item.description: Contributed Griffin (aerial-ground cooperative) dataset support to py123d, implementing the vehicle-side and drone-side parsers.

item.title: Organising team for the Computer Science PhD Day
item.description: Part of the organising team for the Computer Science PhD Day, University of Twente.
